name: BOARD OF REGENTS OF STATE COLLEGES et al. v. ROTH
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in BOARD OF REGENTS OF STATE COLLEGES et al. v. ROTH (408 U.S. 564, 1971 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
